basic_details.job_title: NFDC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Manager, General Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Film Development Corporation (NFDC) General Manager (North), Manager (Administration), Assistant Manager (HR) Notification 2026 has been released on 15 April 2026 on the official website of NFDC. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the NFDC General Manager (North), Manager (Administration), Assistant Manager (HR) Recruitment 2026. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria as per the official notification and possess Graduation / PG Degree / Ph.D. with relevant experience are eligible to apply for these posts. The online application process for NFDC Recruitment 2026 h

age_limit.details: General Manager: Up to 50years Manager: Up to 45 years Assistant Manager: Up to 35 years

qualification.details: General Manager (North)/Delhi: Ph.D. OR 2-year full-time PG Degree/PG Diploma in Mass Communication/Film Studies/Mass Media/Journalism/Film Archiving. Experience: 15 years total (PSU/Govt/Private) + 10 years senior managerial + 7 years in business development/international relations/media planning/skill development related to films. Manager (Administration), Mumbai: Graduation in any stream. Desired: Ph.D. OR 2-year PG Degree/Diploma in HR/Social & Development Studies + Diploma in HR/social work/learning & development/labour laws. Experience: 8 years total + 6 years in Administration/Personnel Management. Assistant Manager (HR), Mumbai: Graduation in any stream. Desired: Ph.D. OR 2-year PG in HR/Social & Development Studies + Diploma in HR/social work/learning & development/labour laws. Experience: 5 years total + 3 years in Personnel Management (recruitment/selection/induction).

selection_process: Shortlisting based on eligibility Personal Interview Document verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NFDC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NFDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NFDC Recruitment 2026 is May 29, 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the NFDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the NFDC Recruitment 2026, covering the posts of General Manager (North), Manager (Administration), and Assistant Manager (HR).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for NFDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the notification, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for the NFDC Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the posts advertised by NFDC?
faq.answer: The salary for the advertised posts ranges from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 2,60,000 per month, offering a competitive remuneration package.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for the Assistant Manager (HR) post?
faq.answer: The essential qualification for the Assistant Manager (HR) post is Graduation in any stream. Desired qualifications include a Ph.D. or a 2-year PG in HR/Social & Development Studies.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any age relaxations provided for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST candidates. They are eligible for a relaxation of 5 years over and above the maximum age limit prescribed for the posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NFDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for NFDC Recruitment 2026 involves shortlisting candidates based on their eligibility, followed by a personal interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for NFDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for NFDC Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It contains all detailed information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application mode for NFDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for NFDC Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates are required to submit their applications through the official NFDC website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the NFDC office for these recruitments?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for posts in Delhi (General Manager - North) and Mumbai (Manager - Administration, Assistant Manager - HR), Maharashtra.
